title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the impact of technology on society.

questions.question: Do you think social media has had more positive or negative effects on society overall?
Should children's access to technology and the internet be restricted? Why?

script.text: Some people say we have become too dependent on technology in our daily lives. To what extent do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
